name: Magadh Sugar & Energy Limited
summary: Magadh Sugar & Energy Limited manufactures and sells of sugar, molasses, and bagasse in India. The company operates through three segments: Sugar, Distillery, and Co-Generation. It also manufactures and sells industrial spirits, including ethanol, as well as fusel oil and bio-compost products; and generates and transmits power. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
